title: koala73/worldmonitor
friendlyTitle: World Monitor is an AI-assisted global dashboard
summary: World Monitor is a real-time global intelligence dashboard that combines AI-assisted news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, infrastructure tracking, maps, finance signals, and local AI support.
friendlySummary: World Monitor collects news, maps, finance signals, and infrastructure information into one dashboard, with AI features for summaries and monitoring.
whyItMatters: Users can self-host or study it as a blueprint for situational-awareness dashboards that combine feeds, maps, AI summaries, and cross-domain monitoring.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help teams or hobbyists build their own real-time information dashboard.
